Notes: ECAC Division II Women's Basketball Championship Game ... Bluefield State wins
2014 ECAC Division II Championship ... GBC plays in 30th game of season to tie
school record ... Bluefield State ends season with 4-game win streak ... GBC
Game.Officials: Michael Motta,  Michael DeCouto,  Erin Kearney
